summary: Study timer app with authentication and Pomodoro-style timer (25-min work, 5-min break)
known_issues: User account creation not working - name and email signup flow failing in production
Account creation button click does nothing - no response when users click the signup button

existing_features.title: Implement user authentication using Internet Identity with login and logout functionality
Create a Pomodoro-style timer with 25-minute work sessions and 5-minute break intervals

Design a clean, minimal user interface with a cohesive visual theme featuring warm earthy tones (terracotta, sage green, cream) with modern sans-serif typography and card-based layouts with subtle shadows
Implement study streak tracking that counts consecutive days with at least one completed study session, storing streak data per user in the backend and displaying current streak count in the UI
Create session history feature that records all completed study sessions with timestamps and durations, storing them in the backend and displaying them in a chronological list in the frontend
Add custom timer settings that allow users to adjust work session and break durations, storing preferences per user in the backend and providing a settings UI in the frontend
Display daily motivational quotes that rotate and appear in the UI, with a curated collection of study-focused inspirational messages
Create a study statistics dashboard with charts visualizing study patterns including daily study time, weekly trends, and session distribution over time periods
Create a frontend component for managing syllabus chapters that displays a list of all chapters with their subjects and allows users to add new chapters with title and subject fields
Add chapter selection functionality to the Pomodoro timer so users can optionally associate their current study session with a specific chapter before starting the timer
Enhance the session history view to display the associated chapter name for each study session, with the ability to filter sessions by chapter
Add chapter-level statistics to the statistics dashboard showing total study time and session count per chapter with visual breakdown
Implement edit and delete functionality for syllabus chapters with confirmation for deletion to prevent accidental data loss
Debug and fix the chapter adding functionality issue in the ChapterManager component to ensure chapters can be successfully created and saved to the backend
Add UI controls in the ChapterManager component to allow users to mark chapters as completed or incomplete with a checkbox or toggle
Display a progress report showing the count and percentage of completed chapters versus total chapters in the ChapterManager component
Add chapter completion statistics to the StatisticsDashboard showing completed vs incomplete chapters with visual breakdown

Investigate why the ChapterManager component fails to add new chapters to the backend, examining the mutation call in useQueries.ts, the backend addChapter function in main.mo, and any error responses or validation issues preventing successful chapter creation

Fix the identified issue preventing chapter creation in the ChapterManager component, ensuring that when users submit the add chapter form with title and subject fields, the chapter is successfully saved to the backend and appears in the chapter list

Investigate and identify why the application is not working in the deployed environment, checking for runtime errors, failed network requests, authentication issues, or broken component rendering in the browser console and network tab
Fix any identified issues preventing the application from functioning, including backend canister initialization errors, frontend build configuration problems, or authentication flow breakages
Ensure the frontend builds successfully with all components properly imported and the useActor hook correctly connects to the backend canister

Investigate and identify why the account creation button in the frontend does not respond when clicked, checking for event handler attachment, form validation errors, missing mutation calls, console errors, and any blocking conditions preventing the button's onClick handler from executing

Fix the identified issue causing the account creation button to be unresponsive, ensuring that when users click the button after entering name and email, the signup process executes and provides appropriate user feedback (loading state, success message, or error message)

new_feature_requests.summary: Study streak tracking (consecutive days of study sessions)
Session history (view past study sessions and total time studied)
Study statistics dashboard with charts showing study patterns
Syllabus chapter tracker to organize study sessions by subject
Create a backend data model for syllabus chapters that includes chapter title, subject/topic, and optional notes or description fields, storing chapters per user with unique identifiers
Add the ability to associate study sessions with specific syllabus chapters by storing a chapter reference in each session record
Add progress tracking showing how many chapters are completed
Add a completion status field to the chapter data model in the backend to track whether each chapter has been completed
Add error handling and user feedback in the ChapterManager component to display specific error messages when chapter creation fails, helping users understand what went wrong
User account creation with name and email fields
Verify that the backend main.mo actor compiles without errors and all public methods are accessible from the frontend
